H4 empty: Native may not be able to enjoy fruits of comforts acquired through efforts.
H2 & H10 empty: Native might get nothing; effort like mirage.
Monsoon Winds: H2 empty - 'Clouds' from H9 (Sun, Mercury, Venus) may pass without 'rain' in H4, as no 'mountain' (H2) to hold them.
